tag: India's largest and Asia's third-largest paint company. From wall paints to waterproofing, home decor to kitchen solutions — transforming spaces for over 80 years across 65+ countries.
about: Asian Paints Limited is India's leading paint company and the third-largest in Asia, with a consolidated turnover of over ₹35,000 crore. Founded in 1942 by four friends in a Mumbai garage, the company has grown into a global powerhouse.

Beyond paints, Asian Paints has expanded into a comprehensive home improvement brand — offering waterproofing (SmartCare), wall textures, modular kitchens (Beautiful Homes), bath fittings, and home decor services.
The company operates 27 manufacturing facilities globally and delivers any shade from 2,000+ colours to any dealer in India within 48 hours.

items.desc: Damp Proof · Crack Seal · Roof Guard

timeline.t: Founded in Mumbai by Champaklal Choksey, Chimanlal Choksi, Suryakant Dani, and Arvind Vakil.
Became India's No. 1 paint company, overtaking established British and European brands.
Launched Colour World — India's first tinting system for instant colour mixing.
Entered the home decor space with Beautiful Homes Service.
Crossed ₹35,000 Cr revenue. Expanded into bath fittings, modular kitchens, and furniture.
